## Type of change

- [ ] New feature

## Checklist
- [ ] My code passes `shellcheck`
- [ ] My code passes `bash -n` syntax check
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
